mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT d.id, d.name, d.keywordid, d.abilityid, d.courseid, d.datavalue, d.status, d.createTime, k.name AS keywordName, a.name AS abilityName FROM cm_kwadict d LEFT JOIN cm_keywords k ON d.keywordid = k.id LEFT JOIN cm_getability a ON d.abilityid = a.id WHERE d.courseid = #{courseId} ORDER BY d.createTime DESC

SELECT DISTINCT d.id, d.name, d.keywordid, d.abilityid, d.courseid, d.datavalue, d.status, d.createTime, k.name AS keywordName, a.name AS abilityName FROM cm_kwadict d LEFT JOIN cm_keywords k ON d.keywordid = k.id LEFT JOIN cm_getability a ON d.abilityid = a.id WHERE d.id IN
#{id}
